network_summary: Dr. Saqib H. Mohajir, DMD (Case Western Reserve 2005) is a dentist-owner who appears on 3 NPPES organization records across 3 Chicagoland ZIPs as authorized official. Documentary investigation shows: (1) Pinewood Dental PC (60467, Orland Park) has relocated to 1150 State Street, Lemont IL 60439 — NPPES address is stale; Saqib is founder/president. (2) Optimal Dental Associates LLC (60477, Tinley Park) is marked CLOSED on Yelp as of October 2025; Saqib is listed as owner/AO. (3) The Alsip entry (60803) is Saqib's individual NPI practice name 'SAQIB H. MOHAJIR, D.M.D.' operating as a sub-part under parent 'MOHAMED K.H. MOHAJIR D.D.S.' at the same address — this is the family practice co-location with his father Mohamed Mohajir DDS, NOT an independent third office. No DSO brand, MSO layer, management company, or PE sponsor was found across any of the three locations.

(2) Optimal Dental Associates LLC (Tinley Park 60477) appears closed per Yelp October 2025. (3) The Alsip location (60803) is a potential AO false-positive: Saqib Mohajir's individual NPI sub-part at his father Mohamed Mohajir's practice address — the AO role may reflect family co-practice, not a separately owned office.
evidence_chain: AO signal: SAQIB MOHAJIR appears as authorized official on 3 NPPES organization NPIs across ZIPs 60467/60477/60803. Documentary corroboration: (a) Pinewood Dental website (pinewooddental.com) confirms Dr. Saqib Mohajir as founder/lead dentist — single location now at Lemont IL, no DSO/MSO mentioned; (b) Yelp listing for Optimal Dental (15916 Harlem Ave Tinley Park) marked CLOSED October 2025; (c) npino.com NPPES mirror confirms Saqib Mohajir as president/AO of Pinewood Dental PC and owner/AO of Optimal Dental Associates LLC; (d) dentistsok.com confirms Alsip NPI 1427228311 is a sub-part of 'Mohamed K.H. Mohajir D.D.S.' at same address — family practice co-location. No management company, DSO platform, MSO, or PE sponsor found in any source.
future_app_notes: 1. Confirm whether ZIP 60467 (Orland Park) remains a watched ZIP even though Pinewood Dental has physically relocated to Lemont (60439) — if 60439 is not a watched ZIP, the NPPES Orland Park record is a stale shell. 2. Validate closure of Optimal Dental Associates LLC in Tinley Park 60477 — if confirmed closed, consider marking location eb... as solo_inactive or stale. 3. The AO reach signal here is a likely false positive — Saqib is not independently owning/operating a third practice, but is a dentist sub-part under his father's organization. The 'small_group' classification (2 providers) reflects the father+son co-practice, not a separately owned Saqib Mohajir office. Not a standalone dentist_multi node.
